_comment: Sprint 22.5+ P0 hooks (claude-automation-recommender 推荐). 3 hooks: 禁 .env/.duckdb 编辑, 改 contract 提醒 regen types, .py 自动 ruff lint. 详细: docs/AUTOMATION.md

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys, json, re; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read() or '{}'); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); bad = re.match(r'(^|/)(\.env|\.env\.local|\.env\..*\.local|data/processed/.*\.duckdb)$', p); sys.exit(2 if bad else 0)"
